text.title: lang-php-phpstan9-psalm-taint Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-php-phpstan9-psalm-taint as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Developer fixes a level 9 failure by appending the new error to phpstan-baseline.neon.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The baseline is for grandfathered code only; using it as an escape hatch for new errors converts the gate into a no-op within weeks.

failure-mode.description: Wholesale @psalm-suppress TaintedSql annotations to silence the analyzer without a sanitizer.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Suppressions disable the gate; the bug remains, the audit trail is empty. Require named-sanitizer comments and reject suppressions that lack one.
